description: Declarative taxonomy of verification runners. Each entry maps to a hand-written module under crates/idiolect-verify/src/<module>.rs implementing the VerificationRunner trait. The generated module in the same crate exposes a RUNNERS slice of descriptors for enumeration; runner instantiation stays caller-supplied because constructors take different configuration (corpus, budget, generator closure) per kind.

runners.description: Apply the lens forward then backward on a caller-supplied corpus and check put(get(src)) == src for every record.
Like roundtrip-test but the corpus is produced by a caller-supplied generator closure rather than a static Vec.
Run panproto's schema validator on the lens's source and target schemas. Does not invoke the lens itself.
